channel.title: Google Authenticator (TOTP) on Tejiri Mayone
channel.description: Recent content in Google Authenticator (TOTP) on Tejiri Mayone

item.title: Google Authenticator (TOTP) two-factor authentication in a stateless Laravel API authenticated via Laravel Passport
item.description: A practical guide to building a modern portfolio website with Hugo, Tailwind CSS, reusable partials, and content-driven architecture.
